preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I took a drink from the cask of ale--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, I come over to Grog and I just look in his eyes and I say, listen, you've got this, I can't give you anything else, but you've got this, man. And I also very quickly take out my Potion of Fire Giant Strength and I slip it to him before he takes a drink of his ale. I don't know if I hand it to him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (squeaks) Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What did you roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's a six. So eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As you walk towards him and begin looking in his eyes, as you begin to pull out the flask, a hand grasps your wrist. And you glance over and you can see one of the burly human gentlemen that escorted Kern the Hammer in is currently grasping your arm and says, "I'm watching you. One more try and I'll throw you in there. We'll go down ourselves."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's for my asthma. I promise.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Shoves you back away, still clutching it. Looks to you, Grog, up into your eyes. "You going to climb down and fight or you going to be a pussy about it?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's a really good question. I would like to rage. And I jump in the fucking pit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You leap over the side, completely avoiding the ladder, both feet hitting the ground with a heavy thud sound. The packed dust kicks up around your feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Come on, Phillip! Kick his ass!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At which point, the other orc's finished cracking his knuckles, just kind of wipes the spit off the edge of his chin, gives you a look (growls) and you see a bit of foam toss from the side of his mouth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Nobody fucks with Phil.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can smell you from here, Kern!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You all get a free round, and then we roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I know, I used it at the fight that you didn't want to fight in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, what's the DC?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17. All right, it does make its save, so half damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: How do I count these? There's a bunch of sevens. Stupid ones.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: All together?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, that's 28.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 43. Awesome. So a total of 22 points of damage from a save. So as it's stepping into the water, it takes an additional, I'll say, additional 2d8 from being in the water. I'll roll them here. Additional nine damage to that. As it pulls back, the stone around it, the rogue leaps up and slams it with a blade, its heads turn around, and as it does, you turn around, vanish from sight, and then... you cast Greater Invisibility or just Invisibility?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Greater.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Release your hands and a torrent of blue electrical energy rockets forth from your hands, streaking out, some parts leaving arcs that hit the nearby forests and then slamming into its body, its exposed heads. You can see the arcs now shooting through between the various necks and bodies. It writhes and streaks about, slamming its body into part of the stone that cracks and heaves from the impact, still holding it in place. Well done. You want to move, or is that your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'm going, what are the big lumps, are those trees?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: These are trees. Anywhere walking on the trunk around it is difficult terrain, you cannot pass.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'm just going to go right behind that tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. That ends your turn. Who else wants to do anything this round?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to shoot him.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 17 points of damage as you hack once again, slamming into the side of one of the necks, causing a gout of purplish blood to spray over the right side of your body. That ends the combat round for the surprise round. The creature is now aware that you're definitely there. Everyone roll initiative. All right, so 25 to 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right now, you can't see because there's a tree in the way, but you're Pepperbox distance from here. You could try Bad News, but you'd have to set up in place.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'm going to start curling around the tree I'm near. I'm going to take some movement to fly over the pond back here. And while I'm making my little round, I'm going to take two shots with the Pepperbox.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so as the carpet's gliding past, you're basically strafing it and (gunshots). Go ahead and fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You have a bear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: She has a bear? We got a bear!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, there's going to be a giant Trinket. That's so stupid.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Full-on misfire. (cackles) Yeah, I misfire. I don't care; we got a bear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. We got a bear. As you strafe past, you pull your Pepperbox and go to fire. Suddenly there's a dull sound, and as you look at your gun, it explodes for a second in your face. You barely manage to get your visage out of the way as the barrel itself is heated up and you have to shake it off. Yeah, your Pepperbox is looking a bit rough right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's fine; I'm putting it away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So everyone else has gone but Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Me? Can I run all the way up and try and pull a Vax, like he did?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hey, I want to try that! And I rage as I attack it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, as you rush up, axe in your hand, you rush up the side of the stone ramp that she's created and it's right in slamming distance. Go ahead.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I swing away. 24.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 24 hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes, and the second. 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16, no. 16 misses. And then?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's it, just the two. I'm not frenzied. Yes. 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so as the carpet's gliding past, you're basically strafing it and (gunshots). Go ahead and fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You have a bear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: She has a bear? We got a bear!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, there's going to be a giant Trinket. That's so stupid.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Full-on misfire. (cackles) Yeah, I misfire. I don't care; we got a bear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. We got a bear. As you strafe past, you pull your Pepperbox and go to fire. Suddenly there's a dull sound, and as you look at your gun, it explodes for a second in your face. You barely manage to get your visage out of the way as the barrel itself is heated up and you have to shake it off. Yeah, your Pepperbox is looking a bit rough right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's fine; I'm putting it away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So everyone else has gone but Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Me? Can I run all the way up and try and pull a Vax, like he did?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hey, I want to try that! And I rage as I attack it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, as you rush up, axe in your hand, you rush up the side of the stone ramp that she's created and it's right in slamming distance. Go ahead.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I swing away. 24.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 24 hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes, and the second. 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16, no. 16 misses. And then?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's it, just the two. I'm not frenzied. Yes. 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17 points of damage as you hack once again, slamming into the side of one of the necks, causing a gout of purplish blood to spray over the right side of your body. That ends the combat round for the surprise round. The creature is now aware that you're definitely there. Everyone roll initiative. All right, so 25 to 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 16. First good roll I've ever had.
